name: ◁ Lebanese Shish TawookCHICKEN SKEWERS
servings: prep time: 10 minutes, plus 1 hour marinating

ingredients.item: ¾ cup (180 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
ingredients.original: ¾ cup (180 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt

ingredients.item: 4 chicken breasts (about 1½ pounds, or 700 g), cut into 2-inch (5 cm) cubes
ingredients.original: 4 chicken breasts (about 1½ pounds, or 700 g), cut into 2-inch (5 cm) cubes

ingredients.item: 1 If using bamboo skewers for this recipe, start by soaking them in water for 15 minutes.
ingredients.original: 1 If using bamboo skewers for this recipe, start by soaking them in water for 15 minutes.

ingredients.item: 2 In a large bowl, mix together the yogurt, tomato paste, oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, paprika, cinnamon, ginger, onion powder, and pepper until well combined.
ingredients.original: 2 In a large bowl, mix together the yogurt, tomato paste, oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, paprika, cinnamon, ginger, onion powder, and pepper until well combined.

ingredients.item: 3 Add the chicken cubes to the marinade and mix until all the chicken is thoroughly coated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the meat marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, or preferably overnight. Take out 30 minutes before cooking to bring the chicken to room temperature.
ingredients.original: 3 Add the chicken cubes to the marinade and mix until all the chicken is thoroughly coated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the meat marinate in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, or preferably overnight. Take out 30 minutes before cooking to bring the chicken to room temperature.

ingredients.item: 4 Skewer the marinated chicken cubes onto the skewers, using roughly 4 or 5 pieces per skewer, depending on the size of the skewers.
ingredients.original: 4 Skewer the marinated chicken cubes onto the skewers, using roughly 4 or 5 pieces per skewer, depending on the size of the skewers.

ingredients.item: 5 Meanwhile, preheat an outdoor grill to 400°F (205°C). If grilling indoors, preheat a large cast-iron grill pan over medium heat and grease it with oil.
ingredients.original: 5 Meanwhile, preheat an outdoor grill to 400°F (205°C). If grilling indoors, preheat a large cast-iron grill pan over medium heat and grease it with oil.

ingredients.item: 6 Grill the skewers for 5 to 6 minutes per side, ensuring the chicken is white and cooked through on the inside and golden on the outside. Avoid grilling the chicken for too long or it will dry out.
ingredients.original: 6 Grill the skewers for 5 to 6 minutes per side, ensuring the chicken is white and cooked through on the inside and golden on the outside. Avoid grilling the chicken for too long or it will dry out.

ingredients.item: 7 Dust the onion slices with the sumac and serve alongside the skewers, assorted vegetables, pita bread, and toum or tarator to make wraps.
ingredients.original: 7 Dust the onion slices with the sumac and serve alongside the skewers, assorted vegetables, pita bread, and toum or tarator to make wraps.
